title: 2 Pcs Mini Metal Cosmetic Spatulas, Silver Makeup Skincare Cream Spoon, Practical Cosmetics Dig Scoop, Skincare Spatula for Sampling and Mixing Makeup Cosmetic Beauty Tools
description:
Package Includes: 2 silver skincare spatulas (6.6 x1.6 x 0.6 cm)
High-quality Material: The cosmetic spatula is made of high-quality stainless steel, which is hard and durable
Cosmetic Partner: The foundation spatula can avoid damaging unused products
Easy to Clean: The beauty spatula can be cleaned with water or wet wipes after use
Wide Application: The skin care scraper is suitable for products such as creams, lotions and essences
reviews_5s: Nice and heavy little spatulas for make up
